raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Senate Budget Subcommittee #3 on Health and Human Services approved at least an eight percent increase for service providers caring for the developmentally disabled community.",
    "Governor Newsom's May Revision of the budget proposed a $330 million increase in spending for some providers of services to the developmentally disabled.",
    "The actions taken by the subcommittee will provide potentially hundreds of millions of dollars more for the developmentally disabled community than what was originally proposed by the governor.",
    "The eight percent rate increase for service providers was one of three action items requested by Senate Republicans for the upcoming 2019-20 fiscal year.",
    "Senate Republicans emphasized the importance of the eight percent increase in the budget, citing a $21 billion surplus."
  ]
}
```
